education_analogy_throughline: teacher, student, textbook, classroom, homework, report-card

modules.title: Task Analysis: The Lesson Plan Beneath Every Prompt

analogy_mapping.lesson_plan: Structured task decomposition preceding any prompt
analogy_mapping.teacher_preparation: The task analysis work a practitioner does before writing a prompt

modules.function: Teach task analysis as foundation and substrate of all prompt engineering.

modules.title: Bilingual Systems: Human-Legible and Machine-Legible Instruction

analogy_mapping.syllabus_prose: Human-readable markdown description of course intent
analogy_mapping.grade_rubric_grid: Machine-legible JSON schema encoding enforcement rules
analogy_mapping.translation_discipline: Keeping prose and schema in sync

modules.function: Teach when to use human-readable prose, machine-legible schema, and paired bilingual documents.

modules.title: Human-Agent Relationships: Trust, Priority, and Communication

analogy_mapping.teacher_student_contract: Implicit relationship norms governing classroom interaction
analogy_mapping.classroom_norms: Mutual respect and clear communication protocols
analogy_mapping.attendance_and_commitment: Trust built through consistent, reliable behavior
analogy_mapping.grade_transparency: Clear priority signaling and honest status reporting

modules.function: Teach that human-agent interaction creates relationship dynamics requiring trust, commitment, clear priorities, mutual respect, and clear communication.

modules.title: Contracting vs. Prompting: The Minimal Contract Window

analogy_mapping.verbal_instruction: A prompt: informal, context-dependent, easily misread
analogy_mapping.signed_assignment_sheet: A contract: explicit obligations, acceptance criteria, halt conditions
analogy_mapping.report_card_vt_row: Verification and Truth statement as minimal grading evidence
analogy_mapping.contract_window: The minimum enforceable surface binding teacher and student to mutual expectations

modules.function: Teach the difference between prompting and contracting; introduce Verification and Truth statement as minimal Contract Window.

modules.title: The Sequester Contract

analogy_mapping.closed_book_exam: Sequestered execution with one authoritative source
analogy_mapping.sst_md: The single textbook open on the desk during a sequestered session
analogy_mapping.weekly_reconciliation: The after-class review where unknowns are resolved against authoritative material

modules.function: Introduce constrained execution and contamination control after learners understand contracts.

modules.title: Building Pro-Grade Evaluation Rubrics

analogy_mapping.rubric: Pro-grade evaluation criteria grid used to grade agents like students
analogy_mapping.green_badge: The passing grade visible on the transcript
analogy_mapping.guardrails_md: The classroom rules posted on the wall

modules.function: Extend Verification and Truth from minimal truth reporting into full evaluation rubrics.

modules.title: Deterministic Evaluations

analogy_mapping.standardized_test: A deterministic eval: same questions, same conditions, reproducible scores
analogy_mapping.docker_container: The sealed testing room ensuring identical conditions
analogy_mapping.golden_snapshot: The answer key against which student work is graded

modules.function: Teach repeatable evaluation as stable grading rather than subjective assessment.

modules.title: Design, Build, Run

analogy_mapping.design_phase: Curriculum design: writing lesson plans and objectives
analogy_mapping.build_phase: Classroom execution: delivering instruction and assignments
analogy_mapping.run_phase: Grading and revision: responding to student performance data

modules.function: Teach the agent lifecycle as curriculum design, classroom execution, grading, and revision.

modules.title: Culminating Project: Build a Domain-Specific Agent with V&T

analogy_mapping.capstone_thesis: The culminating project where the learner becomes the teacher
analogy_mapping.domain_specific_textbook: The agent knowledge base the learner curates
analogy_mapping.final_report_card: The V&T statement as the learner's honest self-assessment of what they built
analogy_mapping.lesson_plan_plus_contract: Task analysis plus Contract Window required as deliverables

modules.function: Require learners to build a domain-specific agent with task analysis, bilingual instruction, contract boundaries, knowledge base, tool plan, evaluation rubric, and V&T statement.
